summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 16/09/2025
The market remained relatively strong during most of the week, though it softened toward the end, reflecting some downward adjustment in prices. Source: Best Oasis Limited

MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The market remained relatively strong during most of the week, though it softened
toward the end, reflecting some downward adjustment in prices. Buying appetite is still visible, though prices have come off slightly.
